sc_cat_item.description:
Use this catalog item to submit a ServiceNow administrative task that was generated by the AI Super Prompt.

How to use

  1. Open your AI chatbot (Copilot, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.).
  2. Paste the contents of super_prompt.txt to initialise the assistant.
  3. Describe the ServiceNow change you need (e.g. "Create a mandatory text variable called 'Cost Centre' on the 'New Laptop Request' catalog item", or "Create a record in our custom table u_project").
  4. For generic table operations the AI will ask you to paste the table's field dictionary and/or existing records as XML — use the optional fields below to provide that context.
  5. Copy the JSON output produced by the AI.
  6. Paste it into the JSON Payload field below and submit.

The attached flow will parse your JSON and automatically perform the requested change in your ServiceNow instance, then add a work note to this request with a summary of what was done.
sc_cat_item.name: AI Super Prompt Executor
sc_cat_item.short_description: Submit an AI-generated JSON payload to automate a ServiceNow admin task

item_option_new.help_tag: Paste the raw JSON that was generated by the AI chatbot here. Do not modify the JSON — submit it exactly as produced by the AI.
item_option_new.label: JSON Payload
item_option_new.name: v_json_payload

item_option_new.help_tag:
Optional. Paste the table's field dictionary XML (or a plain list of field names and types) here so the AI can verify field names and identify required fields.
To export from ServiceNow: System Definition › Tables & Columns › [your table] › Show Dictionary Then right-click the list header and choose Export › XML.
item_option_new.label: Table Schema (optional)
item_option_new.name: v_table_schema

item_option_new.help_tag:
Optional. Paste one or more existing records from the target table exported as XML. The AI uses these records as a reference to understand the correct data format and field values.
To export from ServiceNow: 1. Open the target table list view. 2. Right-click any row header. 3. Choose Export › XML.
item_option_new.label: Existing Records XML (optional)
item_option_new.name: v_existing_records_xml
item_option_new.question_text: Existing Records XML for AI reference (optional)
